eligibilityOutcome.summary: Eligible for the IRS EIN online assistant: principal business is in the U.S., and the responsible party is identified by SSN/ITIN.

reasons.requirement: Principal place of business must be in the U.S. or U.S. territories
reasons.sourceRef: IRS EIN online assistant, "Who can use this tool" eligibility list

reasons.requirement: Responsible party must be identified by SSN or ITIN, not an EIN
reasons.sourceRef: IRS EIN online assistant, "Who can use this tool" eligibility list

collectedValues.label: Legal name of entity (or individual) for whom the EIN is being requested

County and state where principal business is located
Responsible party's SSN, ITIN, or EIN

Was the LLC organized in the United States?
Reason for applying — specify
collectedValues.value: Online retail of handmade coastal home goods

collectedValues.label: Highest number of employees expected in the next 12 months (enter 0 if none)

Name and title of applicant (type or print clearly)

attestation.statement: Under penalties of perjury, I declare that I have examined this application, and to the best of my knowledge and belief, it is true, correct, and complete.

safetyNotice: This packet was assembled by an automated agent from a GovSchema document (us/irs/employer-identification-number-ss4). GovSchema describes and verifies government processes; it does not submit them. No value in this packet has been transmitted to the IRS or any government system. A human must review every value below, confirm it is correct, and explicitly authorize submission through the IRS's own channel (the online assistant, fax, or mail) before this application is filed. This packet is not a government record and carries no legal effect on its own.
